title: trustee-guest-components bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[0.13.0-1]
- Update to version 0.13.0
  Enable tdx-attester (tsm-report)
  Resolves: RHEL-109116

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-3]
- Use cargo vendor-filterer to create vendor Source1, make rpminspect happy
  Resolves: RHEL-73770

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-2]
- A smaller vendor Source1
  Resolves: RHEL-73770

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-1]
- Initial commit on c10s
  Resolves: RHEL-73770
full_text:
[0.13.0-1]
- Update to version 0.13.0
  Enable tdx-attester (tsm-report)
  Resolves: RHEL-109116

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-3]
- Use cargo vendor-filterer to create vendor Source1, make rpminspect happy
  Resolves: RHEL-73770

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-2]
- A smaller vendor Source1
  Resolves: RHEL-73770

[0.10.0^124.git0061d03-1]
- Initial commit on c10s
  Resolves: RHEL-73770
